title: Philippine Overseas Shipping Enterprises. Philippine Overseas
content: 58 Shipping Enterprises (POSE) which own/manage/operate Philippine flag ship trading 59 overseas may apply for a special license subject to the submission of the following 60 requirements: 61 21 a. Articles of Incorporation; 1 2 b. Certificate of Accreditation by the MARINA; 3 4 c. Certified true copy of certificate of ship registry issued by MARINA; and 5 6 d. Proof of payment of a non-refundable filing fee of Fifty Thousand Pesos 7 (PhP50,000.00). 8 9 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 10 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for the application for a special 11 license. 12 13

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
